title: Performance Result
description: Result schema for the performance role. The performance profiler checks for N+1 patterns, algorithmic blowups, latency regressions, and memory issues using read-only tools and approved benchmark commands.

category.description: Performance category (e.g., algorithmic, query, memory, latency, bundlesize).

evidence.description: Benchmark output, code snippet, or profiling data.

findings.description: Performance findings with category, severity, and evidence.

benchmarks_run.description: Benchmark commands executed during the review.

examples.summary: No N+1 patterns detected. Token validation adds approximately 2ms per request, within budget. One medium-severity nested loop found in user search.

findings.issue: Nested loop O(n*m) in user search when both users and roles are large.
findings.evidence: Lines 58-72: for user in users: for role in roles: if role.id == user.role_id
